user.title: Set up HA Input Bridge
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to a Windows PC running HA Input Bridge.

data_description.name: Display name for this bridge.
data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of the Windows PC running HA Input Bridge.
data_description.port: The port used by HA Input Bridge. The default is 8765.
data_description.token: The secret token generated by the Windows bridge installer.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to HA Input Bridge.

abort.already_configured: This HA Input Bridge instance is already configured.

arm.name: Arm bridge
arm.description: Temporarily arm the bridge so input commands are accepted.

seconds.name: Seconds
seconds.description: How long the bridge should stay armed.

position.name: Get mouse position
position.description: Return the current mouse position and screen size.

move.name: Move mouse
move.description: Move the mouse to absolute screen coordinates.

move_relative.name: Move mouse relative
move_relative.description: Move the mouse relative to its current position.

click.name: Click mouse
click.description: Click at the current mouse position.

scroll.name: Scroll mouse wheel
scroll.description: Scroll at the current mouse position.

amount.name: Amount
amount.description: Positive values scroll up; negative values scroll down.

write.name: Write text
write.description: Type text into the active window.

keys.name: Keys
keys.description: List of keys to press together, such as ctrl and l.
